name: madebymj-site
description: Made by MJ — static marketing site. No bundling step; this file exists so Vercel installs dependencies for the /api serverless functions (Stripe Checkout + webhook + contact email).

scripts.build: node --check api/create-checkout-session.js && node --check api/stripe-webhook.js && node --check api/contact-inquiry.js && echo "Static site — no bundling. API functions syntax-check OK."
